{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query is whether FTY720 is FDA approved. FTY720 is the same as fingolimod. In the MEDCORP documents, multiple references confirm that fingolimod is FDA-approved. For example, Document [4] states: 'Fingolimod is the first oral disease-modifying agent approved by the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for treating relapsing-remitting multiple sclerosis (RRMS).' Document [22] reinforces this by stating: 'Fingolimod is the first oral disease-modifying agent approved by the US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for treating multiple sclerosis.' These statements directly confirm FDA approval. The UMLS documents do not provide any information about FTY720 or its FDA status. Therefore, based on the MEDCORP documents, FTY720 (fingolimod) is FDA approved.", "answer_choice": "A"}
